titleStmt.title: SII 26.212: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 212. (A.R. No. 200 of 1909.) AVANĀSHI, AVANASHI TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: Third slab set up in the same place.

p.hi: Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Vīra-Nañjarāya-uḍaiyār: Śaka 1421, Siddhārthi, Kārttigai 17 = 1499 A.D., November 16 (Saturday).

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of land to the god Aviṉāśi-iliṅgaṉ of Dakshiṇa-Vārāṇasi, by a certain Oṉṉakkaḷach-cheṭṭiyār, son of Nandagaṇach-cheṭṭiyār, a merchant of Emmaṟkāl in Tiṇaikkaṇāmbai-nāḍu (Terkaṇāmbi-nāḍu), who is described as the Pradhāna of the king. The land is stated to have been purchased from the temple lands in Avanāśi by paying 15 poṉ to the temple treasury. It is stated that one thousand coconut trees should be grown in the land and the income accruing thereform in due course should be used to provide for certain services to the deity mentioned above. It is further stated that the land was entrusted to some people including Kōḻiyāṇḍār, Sūriyadēvaṉ and Masāṉ who were sons of a certain Āṇḍi of Śēvūr in Vaḍapariśāra-nāḍu and that they and their successors should perpetually continue to carry on the above-mentioned services to the god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
jayātbhudaiya śālivāhana śaka Ā
yirattu nāṉūṟṟu Irupattu Oṉṟukkumel siddhārtati varuṣam
kāttikai ø 10 7nāḷ svasti samastajagadādhipatiyappaśrīkai
lāsanivāsan pārpatiprāṇanātaṉ Ellādevaraval
lavan tekṣaṇa vārāṇāci Aviṉāci Iliṅkaṉukku śrī
maṉ mahāmaṇṭalīśvaran śrīviranañcarāya Uṭaiyar
stirarājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa kālattu nañcaṟāya Uṭai
yar pradhā tiṇaikkaṇāmpaināṭṭu Emmaṟkālattu
nan=takaṇa ceṭṭiyār makaṉ Oṉṉakkaḷac ceṭṭiyār dhammaśā
sanam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭiyāvatu Avaṉāciyil kuṭikkiḻ Uṭai
yavar nilattil Uṭaiyavar paṇṭārattukku kiṟaiyam patinañcu po
ṉ kuṭuttu nām koṇṭa nilam calaākai muṉṟu Inta nilam mu
ṉṟu calaākaikkum Āyiram teṉṉam paḻam poṭṭu toṭṭa
m paṇṇi Inta toṭṭattiluṇṭāṉa Ātāya
Uṭaiyavar Aṅkāṅka poruttukku naṭattakkaṭavatākavum
Inta dhammam vaṭaparicāranāṭṭu ta ṇṭu 100 cevūr Āṇṭi
makkaḷ koḻiyāṇṭār cūriyatevaṉ macāṉ Uḷḷi
ṭṭār makkaḷ makkaḷ cantirātittiyavarai naṭattivara
k kaṭavārākavum Inta dhammattukku Aḻivu paṇṇiṉa
vaṉ keṅkaik karaiyil kovaikkoṉṟa pāva
ttile pokakkaṭavārākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu dhamma
śāsanam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ Aviṉāci Iliṅkaṉukku
Oṉṉakkaḷacceṭṭiyār cevūr kavuṇṭarkaḷ ko
ḻiyāṇṭār cūriyatevar macāppaṉ Eḻuttu Aviṉāci
yil raināṭṭu nampiyār Eḻuttu Ātiyaraiva
ntār Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Inta cātaṉam Eḻutinamaik
ku tiru Aviṉāciyil kaṇakku timmaiyaṉ Eḻuttu ḥ . śrī
cellapiḷḷai Eḻuttu Ilakkaṉ Eḻuttu
Āriyūr timmaiyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 26.212 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
